global_description: Large mammal with a robust, bulky body, covered in thick fur, typically brown, black, or white. It has a large head with small eyes and ears, a prominent snout, and powerful limbs with large paws and claws.
discriminative_attributes: Large head with small eyes and ears

part_details.head: Large with small eyes, small rounded ears, and a prominent snout
part_details.body: Bulky and robust, covered in thick fur
part_details.limbs: Powerful with large paws and claws
part_details.fur: Thick, typically brown, black, or white

spatial_relations: Limbs attached to sides of body
